unresolved_issues: Exact Kimball goods and labor curvature terms are not printed in the paper body.
The paper-side no-price-indexation reset-price exercise needs reconciliation with the implementation's price Phillips curve and `cindp` parameter.
The derivation records reset-inflation measurement equations but does not reconstruct the simulation code that generates model reset inflation.
No Dynare runtime validation was performed.
